# AisleBird

> AisleBird is a free, voice-powered shopping assistant that automatically sorts any list by store aisle — across 11 retail chains and 300+ locations nationwide. Users speak or type items, and the app places each one in the correct department for whichever store they've selected. No manual tagging. No backtracking.

AisleBird is a Progressive Web App (PWA) available at https://aislebird.com/app. It works in any modern mobile or desktop browser, with no installation required. It is free forever for all core features.

## What AisleBird Does

AisleBird solves the aisle-wandering problem: people waste time walking back and forth because their list is not organized by store layout. AisleBird fixes this by:

1. Accepting items by voice ("organic bananas, olive oil, paper towels") or typed text, including comma-separated bulk entry
2. Automatically categorizing each item into the correct department for the selected store
3. Displaying the list sorted by department in the order you walk the store
4. Letting you tap your current aisle to reorder the remaining items for your exact path
5. Remembering your items and suggesting them from history as you type

## Core Features

- **Voice recognition**: Tap the mic and say your items in natural language. Supports add, remove, and check-off commands (e.g., "Got the eggs" checks off eggs).
- **Smart categorization**: Automatic placement of every item into the correct aisle/department based on the selected store type.
- **Store-aware sorting**: Each of 11 retail chains has its own department set. Milk goes to Dairy at Whole Foods, Grocery at Target, and Grocery at Walmart — correctly for each.
- **Walk-the-aisle ordering**: Tap your current department chip and the list reorders to match your path through the store.
- **Import from Notes**: Paste a list from iPhone Notes, any text app, or a recipe — AisleBird parses and sorts it instantly.
- **Geolocation**: Optional location access shows nearby stores sorted by distance in miles.
- **Cross-device sync**: Log in with email to sync your lists across all your devices via Supabase.
- **Guest mode**: Use the app on this device only without creating an account.

## New Features (2026)

- **List Templates**: Save the current list under a name (e.g., "Weekly Whole Foods Run"). Apply any template to the current store in one tap — items are added and sorted automatically. Stored in Supabase per user.
- **Shared Lists**: Invite a collaborator by email. Both the owner and the invitee can view and edit the shared list in real time. No app install needed for the recipient.
- **Out-of-Stock Flags**: Tap the flag icon (🚩) on any item to report it as out of stock at the current store. All users at that location immediately see a ⚠️ warning on that item. Community-sourced, store-specific alerts.
- **Item History & Autocomplete**: Every item added is logged to the user's personal history with a frequency count. As the user types, AisleBird suggests matching items sorted by how often they buy them.
- **Admin Dashboard**: Verified admins see a dashboard inside the app showing total users, new signups this week, total lists created, total items tracked, and recent out-of-stock reports by store.

## Supported Retail Chains

AisleBird supports 11 retail chains. Department sets are tailored per chain.

### Grocery & Warehouse
- **Whole Foods** — Produce, Bakery, Dairy & Eggs, Meat & Seafood, Prepared & Deli, Frozen, Bulk, Pantry, Condiments & Sauces, Snacks, Beverages, Wine & Beer, Wellness & Body, Household, Pet
- **Trader Joe's** — Produce, Dairy & Eggs, Meat & Seafood, Bakery, Frozen, Prepared & Deli, Pantry, Condiments & Sauces, Snacks, Beverages, Wine, Household, Pet
- **Costco** — Grocery, Produce, Bakery, Meat & Seafood, Frozen, Deli, Pharmacy, Personal Care, Electronics, Home, Kitchen, Clothing, Sports & Outdoors, Office, Auto & Tires, Patio & Garden

### General Merchandise
- **Target** — Grocery, Fresh Produce, Frozen, Personal Care, Health, Pharmacy, Baby, Pets, Household Essentials, Kitchen & Dining, Home & Decor, Clothing Shoes & Accessories, Toys & Games, Electronics, Movies Music & Books, Sports & Outdoors, Outdoor & Garden, School & Office, Party Supplies, Luggage
- **Walmart** — Grocery, Fresh Produce, Frozen, Pharmacy, Health, Personal Care, Baby, Pets, Household Essentials, Kitchen & Dining, Home, Clothing, Toys, Electronics, Sports & Outdoors, Auto, Garden & Patio, School & Office, Party

### Pharmacy
- **CVS** — Pharmacy, Health, Wellness, Personal Care, Baby, Household, Grocery, Snacks, Photo
- **Walgreens** — Pharmacy, Health, Wellness, Personal Care, Baby, Household, Grocery, Snacks, Photo

### Hardware & Home Improvement
- **Home Depot** — Lumber, Building Materials, Tools, Hardware, Paint, Plumbing, Electrical, Flooring, Lighting, Garden & Outdoor, Kitchen & Bath, Appliances, Decor
- **Lowe's** — Lumber, Building Materials, Tools, Hardware, Paint, Plumbing, Electrical, Flooring, Lighting, Garden & Outdoor, Kitchen & Bath, Appliances, Decor
- **Friedman's** — Lumber, Building Materials, Tools, Hardware, Paint, Plumbing, Electrical, Garden & Outdoor, Lighting, Home & Decor, Tool Rental

### Farm & Ranch
- **Tractor Supply** — Pet & Animal Feed, Livestock, Poultry, Equine, Pet Care, Seed & Feed, Lawn & Garden, Workwear, Tools, Hardware, Fencing, Sporting & Hunting, Auto & Trailers

## Store Coverage

300+ verified store locations across:

- **California** (119+ locations): Napa Valley, Wine Country, North Bay, San Francisco, East Bay, Silicon Valley, Sacramento, Los Angeles, San Diego — all 11 chains, statewide
- **Chicago** — all 11 chains
- **New York City** — all 11 chains
- **Los Angeles metro** (expanded) — Valley, Westside, South Bay, Beach Cities
- **Austin, TX** — all 11 chains
- **Denver, CO** — all 11 chains
- **Seattle, WA** — all 11 chains
- **Boston, MA** — all 11 chains
- **Atlanta, GA** — all 11 chains
- **Phoenix, AZ** — all 11 chains
- **San Diego, CA** — all 11 chains

## Categorization Intelligence

AisleBird categorizes items using a keyword-matching engine with thousands of product terms mapped to departments. Examples:

- "milk", "eggs", "yogurt", "cheese" → Dairy
- "chicken", "salmon", "ground beef" → Meat & Seafood
- "bread", "sourdough", "bagel" → Bakery
- "bananas", "avocados", "spinach" → Produce
- "ibuprofen", "vitamins", "melatonin" → Health/Pharmacy
- "2x4", "lumber", "drywall" → Lumber/Building Materials
- "paint roller", "primer" → Paint
- "dog food", "cat litter" → Pet/Pet & Animal Feed
- "chicken feed", "horse blanket", "muck boots" → Poultry/Equine/Workwear (Tractor Supply)
- "tide pods", "paper towels", "trash bags" → Household
- "ipad", "charger", "batteries" → Electronics

The engine resolves category names across store types. "Pet food" resolves to Pet at grocery/pharmacy chains and to Pet & Animal Feed at Tractor Supply.

## Voice Command Examples

| What you say | What happens |
|---|---|
| "Add organic bananas" | Adds Organic Bananas → Produce |
| "Two cartons of almond milk" | Adds Almond Milk, qty 2 → Dairy |
| "Remove milk" | Removes Milk from the list |
| "Got the eggs" | Checks off Eggs |
| "Sourdough bread, butter, olive oil" | Adds all three, sorted by department |

## Technical Details

- **Frontend**: Single-page PWA in vanilla HTML/CSS/JavaScript. No framework.
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Realtime)
- **Authentication**: Email + password via Supabase Auth; guest/anonymous mode available
- **Voice**: Web Speech API (works in Safari on iOS, Chrome on Android/desktop)
- **Deployment**: Vercel with automatic deploys from GitHub
- **Database tables**: shopping_lists, user_preferences, user_templates, list_shares, item_stock_reports, user_item_history, app_admins

## Pricing

- **Free** (forever): Full app, 300+ stores, voice, unlimited lists, templates, shared lists, item history & autocomplete, out-of-stock alerts
- **Pro** (coming, $3.99/month): Everything in Free + cross-device sync, smart analytics, priority support, early access

Designed by Jennifer. Built by Siamak Kalhor. Founded 2024. Based in Napa Valley, CA.
